name: Elastic Security
description: Import detection alerts from Elastic Security (Kibana)

url.label: Kibana URL
url.help: URL du serveur Kibana (pas Elasticsearch directement)

api_key_id.help: ID de la clé API Kibana (Security > API keys)

password.label: Password (alt)
password.help: Mot de passe si authentification basique
